creator: stephen.wall@redcom.com
text: When attempting to contact the lang/python311 port maintainer, I received a bounce message from the Mlmmj program for <freebsd0python@FreeBSD.org> because I did not subscribe to that list.  But, I did not email that list, I emailed <python@freebsd.org> per the port Makefile. It's a bit unfriendly that issues are supposed to be reported to port maintainers first, but the port maintainer address is redirected to an email list that you have to go subscribe to before you can send a message to it.
